caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt that reads "CHECK IT OUT MAN" and a black baseball cap with headphones sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. He wears a gold watch on his left wrist. The background features white banners with gold stars and the words "GRIND" and "HUSTLE," along with a dark wall with red text that includes "TALK 101." On-screen graphics are visible, including a logo that says "TALK 101 PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions change as he talks, and he shifts his hand movements, moving his left hand toward his face and then gesturing outward with both hands. The camera angle remains a steady medium shot throughout the scene.
